name: best_trade_signals
description: Scans every monitored Hyperliquid perp and surfaces the strongest 1–2 opportunities. Candidates are scored by a composite of smart-money flow, positioning skew, proximity to liquidation pockets, and recent volatility. Each pick includes a complete setup with levels and reasoning.

max_signals.description: Maximum number of signals to return (1 or 2)

value.description: Formatted trade signals with full setups

sla.refundPolicy: Full refund if signals not delivered within 180 seconds
